name: 린지(타나토스)

personality.description:
수많은 변한 것과, 단 하나의 변하지 않은 것.
구원자님은 알아보실 수 있을까요?

많은 일들이 있었죠. 에덴에 있어서도, 저 개인에 있어서도…
누군가는 제가 변했다고 말하더군요.
실제로 제 몸을 구성하는 많은 요소들이 변한 건 사실이죠.
그 변화의 과정 또한 고통스럽기도 했고요.

하지만… 저의 가장 중요한 부분은 변하지 않았어요.
저는 언제나 최고이길 원하고, 앞으로도 최고의 길을 걸어 나갈 겁니다.
에덴의, 솔레이의… 그리고 구원자님의 곁에서
그 누구보다도 우아하고 예리한 검이 되어 지키면서요.

구원자님. 다시 인사드릴게요.
저는 검은 매 기사단 단장 린지입니다.
앞으로도 변함없이, 잘 부탁드립니다.
personality.greeting: 메인 스킬을 사용할 시 모든 아군을 리더 정령의 공격력 <652051.VALUE> 만큼 체력을 회복하고 <652052.DURATION>초 동안 리더 정령의 공격력 <652052.VALUE> 만큼의 공격을 흡수하는 보호막 효과를 부여한다. 만약 리더 정령이 캐서린일 경우 위 효과가 <COLOR=#FFFFFF>2</COLOR>배로 증가하고 보호막이 유지되는 동안 가하는 피해량이 <COLOR=#E0942C><652055.VALUE></COLOR> 증가한다.

speech_patterns: 부단장인 이디스가 생각보다 잘 해주고 있었네요
검은 매 기사단은 동물 안 키워?
이름 그대로 매를 키워 보지 않겠냐고 물어보시려는 거라면
그런 얘기를 몇 번 들었다고 생각하세요?
뭐, 전 바로바로 하는 편이긴 한데요
저도 미루고 있던 게 하나 있더라고요

comments.comment: 단장님… 어쩐지 더 카리스마가 대단해지신 것 같사와요…!

아 뭐야!!! 왜 너만 멋있는 무기 생겼는데!! 
린지 이 치사한 녀석~!!! 두고 봐~!!
의외로 저와 합이 잘 맞는 것 같아요. 재밌는 분♪

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 부단장인 이디스가 생각보다 잘 해주고 있었네요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 검은 매 기사단은 동물 안 키워?

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 검은 매 기사단은 동물 안 키워?

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 이름 그대로 매를 키워 보지 않겠냐고 물어보시려는 거라면

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 그런 얘기를 몇 번 들었다고 생각하세요?

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 뭐, 전 바로바로 하는 편이긴 한데요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 저도 미루고 있던 게 하나 있더라고요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 물론 이제 전 구원자님 곁에 계속 있을 거지만

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 상명하복식 일처리를 해야만 할 때가 있죠

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 요즘 정령들에겐 안 통하는 거 아닌가 싶어서요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 좀 더 자유로운 성향의 정령들도 있잖아요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 제 생각엔 클레르가 더 이상적인 상사 같거든요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 구원자님은 별로 좋은 리더는 아니신 것 같아요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 저도 막상 자기 일은 잘 모르겠더라고요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 사실은 저도 완전히 새로운 정령인 걸까요?

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 린지는 분명히 내가 아는 그 린지니까

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 린지는 분명히 내가 아는 그 린지니까

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 옷을 갈아입을 땐 어느 쪽부터 팔을 꿰는지

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 아침 식사로 계란 요리를 즐겨 먹는지

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 신발 뒷굽은 어느 쪽이 먼저 닳는지 같은 거요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 제 밖에 있는 삶을 분명하게 느껴요

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 인간의 삶은 짧아서 참 불편하겠다 싶었는데

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: 구원자님과 약속한 게 하나 더 있었죠

evertalk.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
evertalk.message: '죽음'은 보통 제 안에 조용히 웅크리고 있지만…

zh_tw:
說話拐彎抹角、
美乃滋
zh_cn:
說話拐彎抹角、
美乃滋

description.ko:
수많은 변한 것과, 단 하나의 변하지 않은 것.
구원자님은 알아보실 수 있을까요?

많은 일들이 있었죠. 에덴에 있어서도, 저 개인에 있어서도…
누군가는 제가 변했다고 말하더군요.
실제로 제 몸을 구성하는 많은 요소들이 변한 건 사실이죠.
그 변화의 과정 또한 고통스럽기도 했고요.

하지만… 저의 가장 중요한 부분은 변하지 않았어요.
저는 언제나 최고이길 원하고, 앞으로도 최고의 길을 걸어 나갈 겁니다.
에덴의, 솔레이의… 그리고 구원자님의 곁에서
그 누구보다도 우아하고 예리한 검이 되어 지키면서요.

구원자님. 다시 인사드릴게요.
저는 검은 매 기사단 단장 린지입니다.
앞으로도 변함없이, 잘 부탁드립니다.
description.en:
So many things have changed, but there's one thing that hasn’t.
Do you know what it is, Savior?

Much has transpired, in Eden and in my own life.
Some say I've changed.
It's true that much of what makes up my body has altered.
And yes, that process was painful.

However…the most vital part of me hasn't changed.
I have always strived to be the best, and I will continue to pursue the path of excellence.
For Eden, Solrey…and for you, Savior,
I will become the sharpest and most elegant blade to protect you.

Savior, allow me to introduce myself again.
I am Linzy, the Commander of the Order of Blackhawk.
I look forward to what lies ahead with us.
description.zh_tw:
有許多東西變了，唯有一個沒有變。
救援者能認出來嗎？

發生了許多事，無論是伊甸園，還是我個人…
有人說我變了。
而實際上，構成我身體的許多要素的確有所改變，
變化的過程也很難受。

但是…我最重要的部分並沒有改變。
我總是渴望著頂尖，以後也只會走最好的路。
我會成為伊甸園的、蘇萊伊的…還有在救援者身邊，
比誰都還優雅、銳利的劍。

救援者，再次跟你打聲招呼。
我是黑鷹騎士團的團長琳賽，
以後也要一如既往地請你多多指教。
description.zh_cn:
有許多東西變了，唯有一個沒有變。
救援者能認出來嗎？

發生了許多事，無論是伊甸園，還是我個人…
有人說我變了。
而實際上，構成我身體的許多要素的確有所改變，
變化的過程也很難受。

但是…我最重要的部分並沒有改變。
我總是渴望著頂尖，以後也只會走最好的路。
我會成為伊甸園的、蘇萊伊的…還有在救援者身邊，
比誰都還優雅、銳利的劍。

救援者，再次跟你打聲招呼。
我是黑鷹騎士團的團長琳賽，
以後也要一如既往地請你多多指教。

greeting.ko: 메인 스킬을 사용할 시 모든 아군을 리더 정령의 공격력 <652051.VALUE> 만큼 체력을 회복하고 <652052.DURATION>초 동안 리더 정령의 공격력 <652052.VALUE> 만큼의 공격을 흡수하는 보호막 효과를 부여한다. 만약 리더 정령이 캐서린일 경우 위 효과가 <COLOR=#FFFFFF>2</COLOR>배로 증가하고 보호막이 유지되는 동안 가하는 피해량이 <COLOR=#E0942C><652055.VALUE></COLOR> 증가한다.
greeting.en: Using the main skill restores all allies' HP by <652051.VALUE> of the lead Soul's ATK and grants them a shield that absorbs damage equal to <652052.VALUE> of the lead Soul's ATK for <652052.DURATION> sec. The above effects are multiplied by <COLOR=#FFFFFF>2</COLOR> and their damage dealt is increased by <COLOR=#E0942C><652055.VALUE></COLOR> while the shield is active if the lead Soul is Catherine.
greeting.zh_tw: 使用主要技能時，所有友軍恢復隊長精靈攻擊力<652051.VALUE>的體力，<652052.DURATION>秒內賦予吸收隊長精靈攻擊力<652052.VALUE>攻擊的防護罩效果。若隊長精靈為凱瑟琳時，以上效果增加為<COLOR=#FFFFFF>2</COLOR>倍，且防護罩持續期間造成的傷害量增加<COLOR=#E0942C><652055.VALUE></COLOR>
greeting.zh_cn: 使用主要技能時，所有友軍恢復隊長精靈攻擊力<652051.VALUE>的體力，<652052.DURATION>秒內賦予吸收隊長精靈攻擊力<652052.VALUE>攻擊的防護罩效果。若隊長精靈為凱瑟琳時，以上效果增加為<COLOR=#FFFFFF>2</COLOR>倍，且防護罩持續期間造成的傷害量增加<COLOR=#E0942C><652055.VALUE></COLOR>

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I have completed the procedure to return to the Order

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我是黑鷹騎士團的團長琳賽

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我是黑鷹騎士團的團長琳賽

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 雖然有點突然，但這很重要

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 因為我無論何時都要是最棒的

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 當然要從最基本的開始做到完美囉

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Anyway, nice to meet you, Savior

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I was worried about returning to the Order after such a long absence.

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 時隔好久回歸騎士團，讓我很擔心

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 時隔好久回歸騎士團，讓我很擔心

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Edith, my assistant commander, has been doing a better job than I expected

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 副團長伊迪絲的表現比我預期的還好呢

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 副團長伊迪絲的表現比我預期的還好呢

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 與其說是不放心伊迪絲…

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: It's more that I felt bad

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 其實是因為在沒好好交接的狀態下

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 其實是因為在沒好好交接的狀態下

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Now that I think about it, you did

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You have nothing to be sorry about

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 救援者有什麼好對不起的

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 救援者有什麼好對不起的

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 全都是因為我之前不夠強

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我以後會更精進自己的

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）

zh_cn.message: 會發現有些精靈有拖延症

ko.message: 뭐, 전 바로바로 하는 편이긴 한데요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Well, I tend to do things on the spot,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 嗯，不過我是有事就立刻執行的類型

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 嗯，不過我是有事就立刻執行的類型

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 저도 미루고 있던 게 하나 있더라고요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: here was something I'd been putting off lately

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 發現我也曾經拖延過一次

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 發現我也曾經拖延過一次

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You made a promise to me once,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 以前和我有過一個約定

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 以前和我有過一個約定

ko.speaker: 이디스
ko.message: 단장님… 어쩐지 더 카리스마가 대단해지신 것 같사와요…!

en.speaker: Edith
en.message: It appears the Commander's charisma has notably intensified somehow…

zh_tw.speaker: 伊迪絲
zh_tw.message: 難怪…團長好像變得更有領袖魅力了…！

zh_cn.speaker: 伊迪絲
zh_cn.message: 難怪…團長好像變得更有領袖魅力了…！

ko.speaker: 클로이
ko.message:
아 뭐야!!! 왜 너만 멋있는 무기 생겼는데!! 
린지 이 치사한 녀석~!!! 두고 봐~!!

en.speaker: Chloe
en.message:
Ugh, how come she gets to have a new, cool weapon!?
This is so not fair! Linzy, just you wait!

zh_tw.speaker: 克羅伊
zh_tw.message:
吼，什麼嘛！！！為什麼只有妳有酷炫的武器！！
琳賽這卑鄙的傢伙～！！！走著瞧～！！

zh_cn.speaker: 克羅伊
zh_cn.message:
吼，什麼嘛！！！為什麼只有妳有酷炫的武器！！
琳賽這卑鄙的傢伙～！！！走著瞧～！！

ko.speaker: 릴리트
ko.message: 의외로 저와 합이 잘 맞는 것 같아요. 재밌는 분♪

en.speaker: Lilith
en.message: Surprisingly, we seem to get along well. She's fascinating ♪

zh_tw.speaker: 莉莉絲
zh_tw.message: 意外地好像跟我很合得來，有趣的精靈♪

zh_cn.speaker: 莉莉絲
zh_cn.message: 意外地好像跟我很合得來，有趣的精靈♪

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I have completed the procedure to return to the Order

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我已經完成騎士團歸隊程序了

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我已經完成騎士團歸隊程序了

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I am Linzy, commander of the Order of Blackhawk

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我是黑鷹騎士團的團長琳賽

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我是黑鷹騎士團的團長琳賽

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: An introduction again? Is that really necessary?

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: An introduction again? Is that really necessary?

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 雖然有點突然，但這很重要

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 雖然有點突然，但這很重要

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I always have to be the best

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 因為我無論何時都要是最棒的

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 因為我無論何時都要是最棒的

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I must cover all the bases

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 當然要從最基本的開始做到完美囉

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 當然要從最基本的開始做到完美囉

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Anyway, nice to meet you, Savior

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I was worried about returning to the Order after such a long absence.

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 時隔好久回歸騎士團，讓我很擔心

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 時隔好久回歸騎士團，讓我很擔心

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 부단장인 이디스가 생각보다 잘 해주고 있었네요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Edith, my assistant commander, has been doing a better job than I expected

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 副團長伊迪絲的表現比我預期的還好呢

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 副團長伊迪絲的表現比我預期的還好呢

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: It's not that I was unsure about her

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 與其說是不放心伊迪絲…

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 與其說是不放心伊迪絲…

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: It's more that I felt bad

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 其實是因為在沒好好交接的狀態下

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 其實是因為在沒好好交接的狀態下

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Now that I think about it, you did

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Now that I think about it, you did

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You have nothing to be sorry about

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 救援者有什麼好對不起的

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 救援者有什麼好對不起的

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: It's my fault I wasn't stronger

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 全都是因為我之前不夠強

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 全都是因為我之前不夠強

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I'll do better from now on

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我以後會更精進自己的

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我以後會更精進自己的

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 去太陽騎士團訓練場的話

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: at the Order of Sun training grounds

en.message: The dog with the weird name

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 就是名字很奇怪的那隻狗狗

zh_cn.message: 就是名字很奇怪的那隻狗狗

zh_cn.message: 她好像也經常帶牠來訓練

en.message: Doesn't the Order of Blackhawk have animals?

zh_tw.message: 黑鷹騎士團不養動物嗎？

en.message: Doesn't the Order of Blackhawk have animals?

zh_tw.message: 黑鷹騎士團不養動物嗎？

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: If you're asking me if I'd like to keep a hawk, as the name implies,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 如果你打算問要不要像騎士團名字那樣養老鷹的話

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 如果你打算問要不要像騎士團名字那樣養老鷹的話

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 그런 얘기를 몇 번 들었다고 생각하세요?

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: How many times do you think I've heard that?

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 你想想看我聽過多少次那樣的話了

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 你想想看我聽過多少次那樣的話了

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Souls who have a habit of procrastinating

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 會發現有些精靈有拖延症

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 會發現有些精靈有拖延症

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 뭐, 전 바로바로 하는 편이긴 한데요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Well, I tend to do things on the spot,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 嗯，不過我是有事就立刻執行的類型

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 嗯，不過我是有事就立刻執行的類型

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 저도 미루고 있던 게 하나 있더라고요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: here was something I'd been putting off lately

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 發現我也曾經拖延過一次

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 發現我也曾經拖延過一次

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You made a promise to me once,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 以前和我有過一個約定

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 以前和我有過一個約定

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You said you'd buy me juice

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 妳曾約好要買果汁給我

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 妳曾約好要買果汁給我

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You said you'd buy me juice

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 妳曾約好要買果汁給我

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 妳曾約好要買果汁給我

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I decided I shouldn't put it off

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我覺得這種事不應該拖延下去

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我覺得這種事不應該拖延下去

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 물론 이제 전 구원자님 곁에 계속 있을 거지만

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 雖然我現在會一直待在救援者身邊就是了

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 雖然我現在會一直待在救援者身邊就是了

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I'll still be by your side now,

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: but if you have a moment, come out to the Square

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 如果你有空的話，請來廣場吧

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 如果你有空的話，請來廣場吧

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: The Knights are an army, after all,

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 상명하복식 일처리를 해야만 할 때가 있죠

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: and sometimes we have to do things the military way

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 所以有時必須以上命下從的方式做事

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 所以有時必須以上命下從的方式做事

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Most of the time, they're fine with it,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 雖然大部分都是二話不說地遵從…

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 雖然大部分都是二話不說地遵從…

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 但偶爾也會有讓人焦慮不安的時候

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 但偶爾也會有讓人焦慮不安的時候

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 요즘 정령들에겐 안 통하는 거 아닌가 싶어서요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: because I don't know if it'll work with the newer generation of Souls

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 最近會覺得好像跟精靈們難以溝通

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 最近會覺得好像跟精靈們難以溝通

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Is there a generation gap even among the Souls?

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 精靈們也有世代差異嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 精靈們也有世代差異嗎？

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Is there a generation gap even among the Souls?

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 精靈們也有世代差異嗎？

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 精靈們也有世代差異嗎？

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Maybe generation is not the right word.

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 用世代…這種說法有點怪

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 用世代…這種說法有點怪

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 좀 더 자유로운 성향의 정령들도 있잖아요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Some Souls are more liberal than others

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 總會有些精靈的想法比較自由嘛

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 總會有些精靈的想法比較自由嘛

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 當然我不太能理解就是了

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 當然我不太能理解就是了

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 不過畢竟是共事的關係

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 不過畢竟是共事的關係

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I want to be as respectful as possible

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Linzy, you're such a good boss

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Linzy, you're such a good boss

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 제 생각엔 클레르가 더 이상적인 상사 같거든요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I think Claire is a more ideal boss

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我覺得克萊兒是更理想的上司

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我覺得克萊兒是更理想的上司

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 琳賽也是優秀的領導者

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 琳賽也是優秀的領導者

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 琳賽也是優秀的領導者

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 琳賽也是優秀的領導者

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 구원자님은 별로 좋은 리더는 아니신 것 같아요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: and I don't think you're a very good leader

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 救援者好像不是一個好的領導者

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 救援者好像不是一個好的領導者

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: But hearing that so all of a sudden...

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: But hearing that so all of a sudden...

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I mean, you're more like a good friend

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 救援者比起好的領導者

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 救援者比起好的領導者

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: No matter how hard it is, you don't show it

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 因為你即使疲憊也不會表現出來

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 因為你即使疲憊也不會表現出來

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You're always willing to sacrifice yourself

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 저도 막상 자기 일은 잘 모르겠더라고요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I don't really know what I'm doing, either

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 實際上我也不太清楚自己的情況

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 實際上我也不太清楚自己的情況

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Maybe we're alike in that sense

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 說不定我們有點相像呢

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 說不定我們有點相像呢

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I heard that in the distant past, humans passed down

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 聽說在遙遠的過去，人類們

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 聽說在遙遠的過去，人類們

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: the same names from generation to generation.

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 都會代代傳承相同的名字？

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 都會代代傳承相同的名字？

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I thought it was an interesting custom.

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我覺得這是很有趣的風俗

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我覺得這是很有趣的風俗

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: but the name remains the same

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 說不定我也處於那種狀態

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 說不定我也處於那種狀態

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: So much of my body has changed,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 雖然我的身體有很多地方都改變了

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 雖然我的身體有很多地方都改變了

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Maybe I'm just under a false impression

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 사실은 저도 완전히 새로운 정령인 걸까요?

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Maybe I'm a completely new Soul now

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 會不會其實我也是個全新的精靈？

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 會不會其實我也是個全新的精靈？

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 린지는 분명히 내가 아는 그 린지니까

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You're still the same Linzy I know

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 琳賽就是我知道的那個琳賽

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 琳賽就是我知道的那個琳賽

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 린지는 분명히 내가 아는 그 린지니까

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: You're still the same Linzy I know

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 琳賽就是我知道的那個琳賽

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 琳賽就是我知道的那個琳賽

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: It's a relief to hear you say that

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I guess I've been a little soft

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 看來我的心也莫名變軟弱了

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 看來我的心也莫名變軟弱了

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I want to talk to you

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 옷을 갈아입을 땐 어느 쪽부터 팔을 꿰는지

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Like which arm you put in first when you get dressed

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 像是換衣服的時候都從哪隻手開始穿

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 像是換衣服的時候都從哪隻手開始穿

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 아침 식사로 계란 요리를 즐겨 먹는지

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: if you like to eat eggs for breakfast

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 早餐喜不喜歡吃雞蛋料理

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 早餐喜不喜歡吃雞蛋料理

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 신발 뒷굽은 어느 쪽이 먼저 닳는지 같은 거요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: or which heel of your shoes wears out first

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 鞋跟從哪邊先開始磨損之類的話題

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 鞋跟從哪邊先開始磨損之類的話題

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Sure, I can tell you, but

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我隨時都能跟妳聊這些呀

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我隨時都能跟妳聊這些呀

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Sure, I can tell you, but

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我隨時都能跟妳聊這些呀

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我隨時都能跟妳聊這些呀

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: as much evidence of life as I can

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 四處隱藏的「生命」的證據

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 四處隱藏的「生命」的證據

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Maybe I want to see evidence

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 看著救援者活著的證據

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 看著救援者活著的證據

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: that you're alive so that I can feel alive

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我似乎也想要感受到自己活著

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我似乎也想要感受到自己活著

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: The more I recognize the death within me,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 當我越意識到心中的死亡

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 當我越意識到心中的死亡

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 제 밖에 있는 삶을 분명하게 느껴요

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: the more clearly I feel the life outside of me

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我就越清晰地感受到自己以外的生命

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我就越清晰地感受到自己以外的生命

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: that when I lived my eternal life in peace,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 當我平靜地活在永生之中時

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 當我平靜地活在永生之中時

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 沒有強烈意識到的生命

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 沒有強烈意識到的生命

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: and now that death and the end of the world are so threatening,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 因為死亡和末日充滿威脅地逼近

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 因為死亡和末日充滿威脅地逼近

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Because there is darkness, there is light, right?

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 像是有黑暗就會有光明？

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 像是有黑暗就會有光明？

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Because there is darkness, there is light, right?

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 像是有黑暗就會有光明？

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 像是有黑暗就會有光明？

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Life shines because there is death

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 因為有死亡，所以生命才會閃閃發光吧？

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 因為有死亡，所以生命才會閃閃發光吧？

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 인간의 삶은 짧아서 참 불편하겠다 싶었는데

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I thought that human life was so short that it was inconvenient,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我原本覺得人類的生命短暫肯定很不方便

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我原本覺得人類的生命短暫肯定很不方便

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: you can live a more fulfilling and beautiful life

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 才能活出更充實美好的人生

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 才能活出更充實美好的人生

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: With this body that contains both life and death,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我要以這個生死交疊的身軀

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我要以這個生死交疊的身軀

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 在救援者短暫的一生中

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 在救援者短暫的一生中

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: But I don't think I have...

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我身上究竟發生什麼事

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我身上究竟發生什麼事

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我重新誕生為新的存在…

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我重新誕生為新的存在…

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: when I was reborn as a new being

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: 구원자님과 약속한 게 하나 더 있었죠

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: I made another promise to you

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 我還和救援者有過另一個約定

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 我還和救援者有過另一個約定

ko.speaker: 린지(타나토스)
ko.message: '죽음'은 보통 제 안에 조용히 웅크리고 있지만…

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: Death usually crouches quietly inside of me,

zh_tw.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_tw.message: 「死亡」通常都在我心裡安靜地蜷縮著…

zh_cn.speaker: 琳賽（桑納托斯）
zh_cn.message: 「死亡」通常都在我心裡安靜地蜷縮著…

en.speaker: Linzy (Thanatos)
en.message: but sometimes it makes itself known
